summary: Iteration 54: Daily Reports Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 13/13 API tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified working correctly. Fixed vendeur report bug (vendeur_id -> agent_id).
critical_code_review_comments: daily_report_routes.py: GET /api/reports/daily-summary working correctly with all SGL-style columns (No, Agent, Tfiche, Vente, A payé, %Agent, P/P sans %agent, P/P avec %agent, %Sup, B.Final)
CompanyDailyReportsPage.js: Table displays all required columns with proper formatting, negative B.Final rows highlighted in red
VendeurLayout.jsx: 'Payer Gagnant' button confirmed REMOVED from vendeur menu
VendeurRapportPage.jsx: Date filters (Aujourd'hui, Hier, Cette semaine, Ce mois, Tout) and custom date range working correctly
FIXED: vendeur_routes.py - Changed 'vendeur_id' to 'agent_id' in report queries to match lottery_transactions collection schema
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily reports feature fully tested. All SGL-style columns working. Vendeur report fixed to use correct field name (agent_id).

features: Negative balance rows highlighted in red

vendeur_layout_payer_gagnant_removed.verification: 'Payer Gagnant' button NOT present in vendeur menu

vendeur_report_query_field.issue: Report queries used 'vendeur_id' but lottery_transactions collection uses 'agent_id'
vendeur_report_query_field.fix: Changed 'vendeur_id' to 'agent_id' in both pipeline queries

pos_list_name_field.issue: KeyError when succursale or supervisor has no 'name' field

company_daily_reports_page.date_filters: Start date and end date inputs with Filtrer button
company_daily_reports_page.negative_balance_highlight: Rows with negative B.Final have red background
company_daily_reports_page.totals_row: TOTAL row at bottom with aggregated values

vendeur_rapport_page.ventes_par_loterie: Breakdown by lottery with ticket count and amount

phase_status: ITERATION 54 COMPLETE - All daily report features verified
